name: templates
title: Templates
description: Reusable, structured-data templates. `body` remains a free-text fallback from v1; a private predecessor-system audit (not part of this repo) showed templates there are chiefly a JSON Schema (`schema`) plus optional AI-assist config, so v2 adds those fields alongside it. Edit history comes from the record changelog.

fields.name: schema
fields.label: Schema (JSON)
fields.help: JSON Schema describing this template's structured fields -- the core of a template on the audited predecessor. Stored as a JSON string, same convention as invoice_lines/invoices use plain typed fields and this codebase's field-type contract (docs/schema-forms.md) has no dedicated json type. Kept optional (not required) so v1 template records saved before this field existed stay valid to read and re-save.

fields.name: ui_schema
fields.label: UI Schema (JSON)
fields.help: Optional form-presentation hints for `schema` above, e.g. field order or widget choice. JSON string, same storage convention as `schema`.

fields.name: instructions
fields.label: Instructions
fields.help: Human-readable how-to for whoever fills out this template.

fields.name: ai_prompt
fields.label: AI Prompt
fields.help: Instructions an AI assistant would use to help fill this template. Stored config only -- this codebase has no AI auto-fill engine; nothing reads or executes this field yet.

fields.name: ai_assistance
fields.label: AI Assistance
fields.help: How much AI help this template calls for, mirroring the audited predecessor's levels. Stored preference only -- deferred infra, same posture as ai_prompt.

fields.name: default_values
fields.label: Default Values (JSON)
fields.help: Values pre-filled into `schema`'s fields when starting from this template. JSON string, same storage convention as `schema`.

fields.name: example_data
fields.label: Example Data (JSON)
fields.help: A worked example matching `schema`, shown as a sample rather than used as a default. JSON string, same storage convention as `schema`.
